zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Longe於1391年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾素斯 福拉薩爾時，他的父親Sir Roger Thomas Henry Wraxall21歲，母親Lady Isabel de Saint Maur21歲。他於大約1417年與Lady Margaret Godfrey在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1428年被列為 escheator of hampshire and wiltshire。他去世於大約1425年在英國維爾爾享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Longe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from the feminine form of   Long   ‘long, tall’.
French (Longé): derivative of Old French longe ‘(leather) thong’, used in a transferred sense as a topographic name for someone who lived on a long, narrow stretch of terrain.

variants.name: Lange
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Heinz, Horst, Otto, Wolfgang, Ernst, Helmut, Hermann, Manfred, Reinhold.
German, Scandinavian, and Dutch: variant of   Lang   ‘long’. This surname is also found in Poland and in France (Alsace and Lorraine). Compare   De Lange  .
French: variant, with fused definite article l', of Ange 2. Compare Longe 1.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Longe was born in 1391, in South Wraxall, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Roger Thomas Henry Wraxall, was 21 and his mother, Lady Isabel de Saint Maur, was 21. He married Lady Margaret Godfrey about 1417, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. In 1428, his occupation is listed as  escheator of hampshire and wiltshire. He died about 1425, in Wiltshire, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Longe est né en 1391, à South Wraxall, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger Thomas Henry Wraxall, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel de Saint Maur, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Godfrey environ 1417, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. En 1428, sa profession de son indiquée est  escheator of hampshire and wiltshire. Il est décédé environ 1425, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Longeが1391年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアソウス ウラクサルで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Thomas Henry Wraxallは21歳，母Lady Isabel de Saint Maurは21歳であった。約1417年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでLady Margaret Godfreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。1428年，職業は escheator of hampshire and wiltshireと記録されている。彼は約1425年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Longe(이)가 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 소우스 라스알에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Thomas Henry Wraxall(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabel de Saint Maur(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 Lady Margaret Godfrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1428년, 그의 직업은  escheator of hampshire and wiltshire이었다. 그는 대략 1425년 영국 윌츠히르에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Godfrey aproximadamente 1417, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Longe родился в 1391 г. в местности соут раксалл, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Thomas Henry Wraxall было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel de Saint Maur, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Godfrey около 1417 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1428 году он работал по профессии  escheator of hampshire and wiltshire. Он умер около 1425 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.
